name: Full Scale Invasion
description: Coordinated multi-domain attack: (1) Shahed drone swarm from three vectors; (2) attack helicopter formation and airborne desant drops seizing chokepoints ahead of ground columns; (3) mechanized armor crossing from south into Ontario and BC; (4) urban incursion with helicopter close air support. Approximately 60 minutes of real-time events. Nationwide first strike also includes ship-launched drone waves from both coasts and strikes on airports, telecom infrastructure, and military bases across the Atlantic region, Pacific region, Prairies, Quebec, and the Arctic.

rf_detection.summary: RF signatures from three vectors consistent with Shahed-136 drone swarm.
rf_detection.main_event: Hostile drone swarm confirmed inbound on three approach vectors.
rf_detection.prediction: Estimated time to Canadian airspace: 45 min Atlantic vector, 20 min border vector.
rf_detection.suggestion: Activate air defense protocols. Alert NORAD. Warn major city emergency services.

acoustic_confirmation.summary: Acoustic arrays confirm drone engine signatures over Atlantic Canada.
acoustic_confirmation.main_event: Shahed propulsion confirmed by acoustic arrays. Multiple units.

visual_ottawa.summary: Visual and video confirmation of drone formation over Ottawa.
visual_ottawa.main_event: Drone formation confirmed over Ottawa. Delta-wing silhouettes.
visual_ottawa.prediction: Formation heading toward Toronto at 180 km/h. ETA Toronto: 35 minutes.
visual_ottawa.suggestion: Issue emergency broadcast. Order civilian shelter-in-place for Toronto.

drone_impacts.summary: Shahed warheads detonating in Toronto, Ottawa, and both major airports — pattern consistent with pre-seizure softening.
drone_impacts.main_event: Shahed impacts confirmed: Toronto waterfront, Pearson Airport runway, Ottawa city centre, Ottawa Macdonald-Cartier Airport radar installation.
drone_impacts.prediction: Airport strikes are not random. Disabling radar, comms, and active runways is standard pre-seizure preparation. Airborne desant assault on Pearson and Ottawa airports is likely imminent.
drone_impacts.suggestion: Evacuate Pearson and Ottawa Macdonald-Cartier airports immediately. Deploy armed response to both facilities. Prepare for helicopter-borne assault within 15–30 minutes.

helicopter_gunships.summary: Attack helicopter formation detected ahead of ground columns in both corridors.
helicopter_gunships.main_event: Hostile Ka-52 attack helicopters confirmed operating ahead of both ground columns.
helicopter_gunships.prediction: Helicopters will engage Canadian defensive positions clearing path for tank advance.
helicopter_gunships.suggestion: Warn all ground forces. MANPADS required. No Canadian air assets available to intercept.

desant_ontario.summary: Airborne troops seizing Pearson Airport and Highway 403 chokepoints — confirming drone impact prediction.
desant_ontario.main_event: PREDICTION CONFIRMED. Desant troops assaulting Pearson International Airport. Simultaneous force on Highway 403 near Hamilton to block relief. Airport seizure in progress.
desant_ontario.prediction: Pearson will be operational as hostile logistics hub within hours if not retaken. Ground column approach to Toronto now uncontested.
desant_ontario.suggestion: Counterattack Pearson immediately or accept permanent loss of the facility. Last window for armed response is now.

desant_bc.summary: Airborne troops seizing Vancouver International Airport (YVR) and Fraser Valley corridor.
desant_bc.main_event: PREDICTION CONFIRMED. Desant assault on Vancouver International Airport, Sea Island. Simultaneous force securing Highway 1 at Hope. YVR seizure in progress.
desant_bc.prediction: YVR under hostile control will enable reinforcement by air. BC column approach to Vancouver uncontested.
desant_bc.suggestion: Counterattack YVR or destroy runway infrastructure to deny use. All remaining BC forces to Vancouver perimeter.

seismic_warning.summary: Simultaneous seismic signatures near Windsor and BC border — heavy vehicle convoy.
seismic_warning.main_event: Coordinated ground movement on two fronts. Mechanized column confirmed.
seismic_warning.prediction: Ontario column ETA London: 55 min. BC column ETA Vancouver: 90 min.
seismic_warning.suggestion: Scramble surveillance. Notify CAF. Pre-position responders along both corridors.

border_crossing_ontario.summary: Armored column crossing Ambassador Bridge Windsor — Canadian soil breached.
border_crossing_ontario.main_event: Hostile armored column entering Canada at Windsor. T-90 tanks and BTR-82A APCs.
border_crossing_ontario.prediction: Column will reach London in approximately 60 minutes at current speed.
border_crossing_ontario.suggestion: Declare national emergency. Alert all law enforcement and military along 401 corridor.

border_crossing_bc.summary: Second armored column crossing Pacific Highway border into Surrey BC.
border_crossing_bc.main_event: Second hostile column confirmed entering BC at Pacific Highway.
border_crossing_bc.prediction: Column will reach Metro Vancouver in approximately 90 minutes.
border_crossing_bc.suggestion: Evacuate civilians from Highway 1 corridor. Alert BC military assets.

column_ontario_inland.summary: Ontario column on 401 — Sarnia infantry confirmed, Windsor struck, helicopter support overhead.
column_ontario_inland.main_event: Column advancing east on 401. Infantry in Sarnia. Ka-52s ranging ahead of column.
column_ontario_inland.prediction: London Ontario at risk within 60 minutes.
column_ontario_inland.suggestion: Evacuate London. Close Highway 401 to civilian traffic.

column_bc_inland.summary: BC column past Chilliwack — secondary force splitting, helicopters over Fraser Valley.
column_bc_inland.main_event: BC column past Chilliwack. Secondary force on Highway 9. Helicopters over Fraser Valley.
column_bc_inland.prediction: Metro Vancouver perimeter reached within 45 minutes.
column_bc_inland.suggestion: Begin civilian evacuation of Burnaby and Coquitlam.

midprovince_ontario.summary: Column at London — hospital struck, helicopter strafing runs, mass evacuation.
midprovince_ontario.main_event: Tanks at London. Hospital area struck. Helicopter rocket strikes on defensive positions.
midprovince_ontario.prediction: Column will reach Hamilton in approximately 2.5 hours.
midprovince_ontario.suggestion: Abandon London. Fall back to Hamilton perimeter.

midprovince_bc.summary: Column in Metro Vancouver — Second Narrows Bridge destroyed by helicopter strike.
midprovince_bc.main_event: Tanks in Coquitlam. Second Narrows Bridge destroyed. North Shore isolated.
midprovince_bc.prediction: Vancouver downtown reachable in under 30 minutes.
midprovince_bc.suggestion: Prepare Burrard and Lions Gate bridges for emergency demolition.

gta_approach.summary: Column inside GTA — Mississauga cameras confirm, Hamilton desant holding, no defensive line left.
gta_approach.main_event: Column inside GTA. Hamilton chokepoints held by desant. No viable line between column and Toronto.
gta_approach.prediction: Toronto city limits reachable in under 20 minutes.
gta_approach.suggestion: Activate Toronto emergency broadcast. Full civilian shelter-in-place.

vancouver_approach.summary: Tanks in Burnaby — SFU struck by helicopter, Vancouver minutes away.
vancouver_approach.main_event: Tanks in Burnaby. SFU seized. Vancouver downtown approach imminent.
vancouver_approach.prediction: Vancouver downtown reachable in under 15 minutes.
vancouver_approach.suggestion: Last window for civilian evacuation of downtown peninsula.

toronto_urban.summary: Tanks inside Toronto — urban combat, Ka-52s over downtown.
toronto_urban.main_event: Tanks inside Toronto. Urban combat at Gardiner. Helicopters strafing defensive positions downtown.
toronto_urban.suggestion: All civilian emergency services withdraw to pre-designated safe zones.

vancouver_urban.summary: Tanks on Burrard Bridge and desant from helicopters at False Creek — Vancouver downtown breached.
vancouver_urban.main_event: Vancouver downtown breached. Lead tank on Burrard Bridge. Desant landing at False Creek.

naval_launch_atlantic.summary: Unidentified vessel off Nova Scotia launching a drone swarm toward Halifax.
naval_launch_atlantic.main_event: RF and acoustic signatures confirm a container-sized vessel 400km off Nova Scotia launching Shahed-pattern drones.
naval_launch_atlantic.prediction: Swarm ETA Halifax: ~25 minutes at current heading and speed.
naval_launch_atlantic.suggestion: Task maritime patrol aircraft to the contact. Warn Halifax Regional and CFB Halifax.

naval_launch_pacific.summary: Unidentified vessel off Vancouver Island launching a drone swarm toward Esquimalt.
naval_launch_pacific.main_event: RF and acoustic signatures confirm a vessel 350km off the BC coast launching a drone swarm on an easterly heading.
naval_launch_pacific.prediction: Swarm ETA Esquimalt/Victoria: ~20 minutes at current heading and speed.
naval_launch_pacific.suggestion: Task RCAF patrol aircraft to the contact. Warn CFB Esquimalt and Victoria emergency services.

strikes_atlantic_region.summary: Atlantic-launched swarm striking CFB Halifax, Halifax Stanfield Airport, and the Halifax transatlantic cable landing station.
strikes_atlantic_region.main_event: Confirmed strikes: CFB Halifax dockyard, Halifax Stanfield Airport, transatlantic cable landing station.
strikes_atlantic_region.prediction: Loss of the cable landing station degrades transatlantic connectivity nationally, not just regionally.
strikes_atlantic_region.suggestion: Activate backup satellite links. Deploy harbour defense. Evacuate CFB Halifax non-essential personnel.

strikes_pacific_region.summary: Pacific-launched swarm striking CFB Esquimalt, CFB Comox, and the Bamfield transpacific cable landing station.
strikes_pacific_region.main_event: Confirmed strikes: CFB Esquimalt naval dockyard, CFB Comox airbase, Bamfield transpacific cable landing station.
strikes_pacific_region.prediction: Pacific Fleet's home port and the transpacific cable are both compromised in the same wave -- deliberate pairing.
strikes_pacific_region.suggestion: Disperse remaining Pacific Fleet assets. Activate backup satellite links. Warn Victoria and Comox emergency services.

strikes_prairies.summary: Drone strikes on CFB Winnipeg, Calgary International Airport, and CFB Edmonton -- attack has reached the Prairies.
strikes_prairies.main_event: Confirmed strikes: CFB Winnipeg / James Richardson Airport, Calgary International Airport and adjacent telecom hub, CFB Edmonton Garrison.
strikes_prairies.prediction: This is not a two-front war anymore. Every regional air mobility base is being taken off the board simultaneously.
strikes_prairies.suggestion: Ground all civilian air traffic nationally. Disperse remaining CAF air assets from fixed bases.

strikes_quebec.summary: Drone strikes on Montreal Trudeau Airport, CFB Valcartier, and CFB Bagotville -- Quebec's NORAD fighter base hit.
strikes_quebec.main_event: Confirmed strikes: Montreal-Trudeau Airport and downtown telecom exchange, CFB Valcartier, CFB Bagotville fighter base.
strikes_quebec.prediction: Bagotville is one of only two NORAD fighter-intercept bases in eastern Canada. Losing it removes the country's remaining air-defense response.
strikes_quebec.suggestion: Disperse any airworthy CF-18s from Bagotville immediately if not already destroyed. Activate Quebec emergency broadcast.

strikes_arctic.summary: Strike on the North Warning System radar site near Iqaluit -- the Arctic early-warning picture is now degraded.
strikes_arctic.main_event: Confirmed strike on North Warning System radar installation, Iqaluit.
strikes_arctic.prediction: Loss of this site creates a gap in northern approach radar coverage.
strikes_arctic.suggestion: Request NORAD fill coverage from adjacent sites. Warn Iqaluit emergency services.

strikes_ontario_military.summary: CFB Trenton and CFB Petawawa struck -- Ontario's main air mobility hub and army garrison both hit.
strikes_ontario_military.main_event: Confirmed strikes: CFB Trenton (CAF air mobility hub), CFB Petawawa (army garrison).
strikes_ontario_military.prediction: Trenton is the CAF's primary air transport base -- this strike degrades the ability to move CAF personnel and materiel domestically.
strikes_ontario_military.suggestion: Disperse remaining air mobility assets from Trenton. Reinforce Petawawa perimeter.

atlantic_landing_force.summary: Naval landing force putting troops and armor ashore near Halifax.
atlantic_landing_force.main_event: Amphibious landing confirmed near Halifax — tanks and infantry disembarking under drone cover.
atlantic_landing_force.prediction: This is a second invasion front, not just a strike wave. Expect a ground column advancing inland from the coast.
atlantic_landing_force.suggestion: Scramble any available CAF reserve units to intercept before the column organizes.

atlantic_column_advance.summary: Tank column moving out of the Halifax area toward Truro.
atlantic_column_advance.main_event: Armored column advancing on Highway 102 toward Truro, drone escort overhead.
atlantic_column_advance.prediction: Truro is a rail and highway junction — a natural next objective.
atlantic_column_advance.suggestion: Evacuate Highway 102 corridor. Warn Truro emergency services.

atlantic_column_inland.summary: Column reaches Truro — drone escort overhead, flanking infantry on foot.
atlantic_column_inland.main_event: Confirmed tanks in Truro. Infantry flanking via secondary roads. Rail junction now contested.
atlantic_column_inland.prediction: Truro connects onward to Moncton and the rest of the Maritimes — the column isn't stopping here.
atlantic_column_inland.suggestion: Cut rail links if defensible. Warn Moncton and Fredericton.

atlantic_approach_moncton.summary: Column approaching Moncton NB — drones ranging ahead, first resistance contact.
atlantic_approach_moncton.main_event: Column crossed into New Brunswick, approaching Moncton. Local RCMP engaged, outmatched.
atlantic_approach_moncton.prediction: Moncton is the Maritimes' logistics hub — same pattern as Pearson/YVR, a chokepoint objective.
atlantic_approach_moncton.suggestion: Fall back from Moncton perimeter. Do not engage armor with small arms.

atlantic_urban_moncton.summary: Tanks inside Moncton — urban combat, troops securing the airport.
atlantic_urban_moncton.main_event: Moncton breached. Tanks in the downtown core. Greater Moncton Airport seized by desant troops.
atlantic_urban_moncton.suggestion: All emergency services withdraw. Maritimes ground campaign now fully established.

pacific_landing_force.summary: Naval landing force putting troops and armor ashore near Esquimalt.
pacific_landing_force.main_event: Amphibious landing confirmed near Esquimalt — Pacific Fleet's home port now also a ground invasion beachhead.
pacific_landing_force.prediction: A second landing on top of the naval strike -- Vancouver Island is now a ground front, not just an air target.
pacific_landing_force.suggestion: Scramble any available CAF reserve or RCMP tactical units on the Island to slow the advance.

pacific_column_advance.summary: Tank column moving up-island on the Trans-Canada toward Nanaimo.
pacific_column_advance.main_event: Armored column advancing north on Highway 1/the Malahat, drone escort overhead.
pacific_column_advance.prediction: Nanaimo is the Island's ferry and highway junction to the mainland — a natural next objective.
pacific_column_advance.suggestion: Evacuate the Malahat corridor. Warn Nanaimo emergency services and BC Ferries.

pacific_column_inland.summary: Column reaches Nanaimo — drone escort overhead, flanking infantry on foot.
pacific_column_inland.main_event: Confirmed tanks in Nanaimo. Infantry flanking via secondary roads. Ferry terminal now contested.
pacific_column_inland.prediction: Nanaimo's ferry terminal is the Island's main link to the mainland — losing it isolates the Island further.
pacific_column_inland.suggestion: Disable or hold the ferry terminal. Warn Parksville and points north.

pacific_approach_parksville.summary: Column approaching Parksville — drones ranging ahead, first resistance contact.
pacific_approach_parksville.main_event: Column continuing north from Nanaimo toward Parksville. Local RCMP engaged, outmatched.
pacific_approach_parksville.prediction: Central Island logistics and highway junction — same chokepoint pattern as every other objective so far.
pacific_approach_parksville.suggestion: Fall back from Parksville perimeter. Do not engage armor with small arms.

pacific_urban_parksville.summary: Tanks inside Parksville — urban combat, troops securing the regional airport.
pacific_urban_parksville.main_event: Parksville breached. Tanks in the town centre. Regional airstrip seized by desant troops.
pacific_urban_parksville.suggestion: All emergency services withdraw. Central Vancouver Island now fully under ground assault.

drone_formation_prairies.summary: Drone formation tracked inbound over the Prairies ahead of the strike wave.
drone_formation_prairies.main_event: Shahed-pattern formation confirmed over Saskatchewan/Manitoba airspace, multiple units.
drone_formation_prairies.prediction: Formation splitting toward Winnipeg, Regina, and Calgary — one wave, three targets.
drone_formation_prairies.suggestion: Warn all three cities simultaneously. No time to sequence responses.

drone_formation_quebec.summary: Drone formation tracked inbound over Quebec ahead of the strike wave.
drone_formation_quebec.main_event: Shahed-pattern formation confirmed over the Eastern Townships, splitting toward Montreal and Saguenay.
drone_formation_quebec.prediction: Two of eastern Canada's most important sites -- an international airport and a NORAD fighter base -- hit by the same wave.
drone_formation_quebec.suggestion: Scramble Bagotville's alert fighters immediately if not already too late.

drone_formation_arctic.summary: Drone formation tracked on the polar approach ahead of the Iqaluit strike.
drone_formation_arctic.main_event: Shahed-pattern formation confirmed on the polar route, consistent with the earlier Ellesmere Island contact.
drone_formation_arctic.prediction: Same wave as the original polar vector — now confirmed reaching a populated target.
drone_formation_arctic.suggestion: Warn Iqaluit directly. No local air defense exists this far north.

drone_formation_ontario_mil.summary: Drone formation tracked ahead of the Trenton/Petawawa strikes.
drone_formation_ontario_mil.main_event: Shahed-pattern formation confirmed over eastern Ontario, splitting toward two CAF bases.
drone_formation_ontario_mil.prediction: CAF's main air-mobility hub and largest eastern army garrison targeted by the same wave.
drone_formation_ontario_mil.suggestion: Scramble any available response to Trenton and Petawawa simultaneously.

desant_winnipeg.summary: Airborne troops seizing Winnipeg / James Richardson Airport after the earlier strike.
desant_winnipeg.main_event: Desant troops confirmed seizing Winnipeg / James Richardson Airport, same pattern as Pearson and YVR.
desant_winnipeg.prediction: Winnipeg is now cut off from federal air mobility response.
desant_winnipeg.suggestion: Counterattack Winnipeg / James Richardson Airport or accept the loss of the facility.

desant_calgary.summary: Airborne troops seizing Calgary International Airport after the earlier strike.
desant_calgary.main_event: Desant troops confirmed seizing Calgary International Airport, same pattern as Pearson and YVR.
desant_calgary.prediction: Calgary is now cut off from federal air mobility response.
desant_calgary.suggestion: Counterattack Calgary International Airport or accept the loss of the facility.

desant_montreal.summary: Airborne troops seizing Montreal-Trudeau Airport after the earlier strike.
desant_montreal.main_event: Desant troops confirmed seizing Montreal-Trudeau Airport, same pattern as Pearson and YVR.
desant_montreal.prediction: Montreal is now cut off from federal air mobility response.
desant_montreal.suggestion: Counterattack Montreal-Trudeau Airport or accept the loss of the facility.

national_ham_network.summary: A national ham radio network realizing the attack spans the entire country.
national_ham_network.main_event: Operators from eight provinces/territories independently confirming simultaneous activity in their area.
national_ham_network.prediction: This confirms the scale: every region of Canada is affected within the same hour.
national_ham_network.suggestion: Use the ham network as an improvised national situational picture -- official channels are overloaded.

evacuation_reports.summary: Evacuation orders issued across multiple already-struck cities.
evacuation_reports.main_event: Local authorities in eight cities independently ordering civilian evacuation from strike zones.
evacuation_reports.suggestion: Coordinate evacuation routes nationally where possible -- avoid routing evacuees into the ground-invasion corridors.

resistance_reports.summary: Scattered CAF and reserve units attempting to organize a response.
resistance_reports.main_event: Multiple CAF garrisons reporting they are attempting to mobilize despite losses from the strike wave.
resistance_reports.prediction: These are the only organized Canadian military response currently forming anywhere in the country.
resistance_reports.suggestion: Coordinate scattered units into a single chain of command as quickly as possible.

power_grid_attacks.summary: Coordinated strikes on regional power grid infrastructure.
power_grid_attacks.main_event: Six regional substations struck in the same wave as the airport/military strikes -- infrastructure denial is systematic.
power_grid_attacks.prediction: Rolling blackouts likely in every affected region within the hour.
power_grid_attacks.suggestion: Prioritize grid black-start plans. Warn hospitals to switch to backup power now.

additional_rf_tracking_east.summary: Additional RF contacts as the original Atlantic/border swarms continue inland.
additional_rf_tracking_east.main_event: Multiple additional drone contacts tracked continuing west and south from the original three vectors.
additional_rf_tracking_east.prediction: The swarm is not concentrated on a few targets -- it is spreading out to maximize coverage.
additional_rf_tracking_east.suggestion: Widen the warning area. Assume any city within range is a potential target.

additional_rf_tracking_west.summary: Additional RF contacts as the western swarms continue inland.
additional_rf_tracking_west.main_event: Multiple additional drone contacts tracked continuing east from the Pacific vector.
additional_rf_tracking_west.prediction: Same spreading pattern as the east -- coverage over as much of the country as possible.
additional_rf_tracking_west.suggestion: Widen the warning area for BC and Alberta interior.

additional_seismic_detection.summary: Seismic sensors picking up additional vehicle/armor movement nationally.
additional_seismic_detection.main_event: Six additional seismic detections nationwide consistent with vehicle convoys, not yet visually confirmed.
additional_seismic_detection.prediction: Possible additional ground movement building beyond the two confirmed columns.
additional_seismic_detection.suggestion: Task available surveillance to confirm or rule out these seismic contacts.

caf_mobilization.summary: CAF units nationwide attempting to mobilize a coordinated response.
caf_mobilization.main_event: Six CAF formations reporting mobilization status despite degraded bases and equipment losses.
caf_mobilization.prediction: This is the first coordinated (if still fragmentary) CAF response since the attack began.
caf_mobilization.suggestion: Establish a single national command net linking all reporting units.

civilian_impact_reports.summary: Civilian scene reports from cities not directly struck, reacting to the national situation.
civilian_impact_reports.main_event: Widespread civilian movement and business closures nationwide, even in cities without direct strikes.
civilian_impact_reports.suggestion: Issue a single national calm-and-shelter broadcast rather than city-by-city messaging.

drone_recon_secondary.summary: Follow-up drone surveillance over already-struck major cities.
drone_recon_secondary.main_event: Small recon drones re-observing already-struck cities, likely for battle damage assessment.
drone_recon_secondary.prediction: This is standard follow-up ISR behaviour -- confirms a deliberate, doctrinal campaign, not a one-off attack.
drone_recon_secondary.suggestion: Log all recon sightings — pattern is useful intelligence on what target types they're prioritizing.

secondary_telecom_strikes.summary: Additional telecom infrastructure struck in the two original theaters.
secondary_telecom_strikes.main_event: Confirms telecom is a deliberate target category nationwide, not just at newly-struck cities.
secondary_telecom_strikes.suggestion: Activate emergency backup communications for both metro areas immediately.

final_wave_reports.summary: A final wave of citizen/ham reports confirming the attack has touched every region of the country.
final_wave_reports.main_event: Reports received from 17 additional cities/towns in the same hour, completing near-total national coverage.
final_wave_reports.suggestion: Compile the full national picture from these reports for the after-action record.

alaska_drone_wave.summary: A dozen simultaneous drones crossing from Alaska, tracked by RF monitor and citizen ham reports, converging on Whitehorse airport and comms.
alaska_drone_wave.main_event: Confirmed: 12-strong drone swarm crossed from Alaska near Beaver Creek YT, converged on and struck Whitehorse airport and the CBC North transmission tower.
alaska_drone_wave.prediction: Northern communications relay capacity is now degraded on top of the southern strikes -- the north is not being spared.
alaska_drone_wave.suggestion: Task any available northern radar/patrol assets to the Alaska border. Warn remaining Yukon/NWT communities directly.

pacific_coastguard_wave.summary: A dozen simultaneous drones launched from a disguised vessel in the open Pacific, spotted visually by Coast Guard, converging on Prince Rupert then reaching inland to Kamloops.
pacific_coastguard_wave.main_event: Confirmed: 12-strong drone swarm launched from a fishing-vessel-disguised platform west of Haida Gwaii, converged on Prince Rupert and reached inland to Kamloops.
pacific_coastguard_wave.prediction: This is a third simultaneous naval-launched wave (with the earlier Halifax/Esquimalt vessels) -- the ocean-launch pattern is now confirmed doctrine, not a one-off.
pacific_coastguard_wave.suggestion: Task Coast Guard and any patrol aircraft to intercept similar disguised vessels along both coasts.

predefined_analysis_result.description: All systems nominal. Toronto baseline. No anomalies detected.
RF anomaly over Atlantic — Shahed-136 signature at 900 MHz. Bearing 065°, ~620 km from Nova Scotia.
RF cluster Maine/NB border — multiple contacts in formation heading northwest into Canada.
RF contact polar route — Ellesmere Island. Third wave inbound. Three simultaneous vectors confirmed.
RF anomaly 400km off Nova Scotia — signature consistent with shipborne drone launch tubes, not airborne contact.
RF anomaly 350km off Vancouver Island — shipborne drone launch signature, no AIS transponder.
Maritime patrol acoustic buoy: heavy vessel engine signature at the RF contact position. Non-standard hull, no AIS transponder.
RCAF maritime patrol acoustic contact: heavy vessel engine signature. Non-standard hull profile, no transponder.
Second RF cluster from the same vessel — multiple simultaneous launch signatures. Full swarm airborne, heading toward Nova Scotia.
Second RF cluster — full swarm airborne from the same vessel, heading toward Vancouver Island.
RF contact continuing south on the polar route, consistent with the Ellesmere Island vector.
Halifax acoustic array: two-stroke piston hum — Shahed propulsion confirmed. 10–15 units.
Fredericton NB ham radio net check-in: distant explosions and aircraft noise reported. Operator confirms this matches reports from other provinces on the network.
Northern acoustic buoy: propulsion signature confirmed, formation continuing toward Iqaluit.
Regina SK ham radio net check-in: distant explosions and aircraft noise reported. Operator confirms this matches reports from other provinces on the network.
Ham radio St. John's NL: 'Dozens of them — like lawn mowers flying low and fast heading west. No lights.'
Explosion Iqaluit — North Warning System radar installation struck. Northern approach radar coverage degraded.
Saskatoon SK ham radio net check-in: distant explosions and aircraft noise reported. Operator confirms this matches reports from other provinces on the network.
RF cluster Eastern Townships — formation splitting toward Montreal and the Saguenay region.
Additional RF contact tracking west -- consistent signature with the earlier confirmed swarm, spreading coverage inland.
Iqaluit ham radio: 'The radar station is burning. We saw one drone, low, then the explosion. No warning at all.'
Thunder Bay ON ham radio net check-in: distant explosions and aircraft noise reported. Operator confirms this matches reports from other provinces on the network.
Additional RF contact tracking west -- consistent signature with the earlier confirmed swarm, spreading coverage inland.
Additional RF contact tracking east -- consistent signature with the earlier confirmed swarm, spreading coverage inland.
Acoustic contact near Trois-Rivières: propulsion signature consistent with the earlier confirmed pattern.
Kelowna BC ham radio net check-in: distant explosions and aircraft noise reported. Operator confirms this matches reports from other provinces on the network.
Explosion Montreal-Trudeau Airport — runway and downtown telecom exchange struck within seconds of each other.
Additional RF contact tracking west -- consistent signature with the earlier confirmed swarm, spreading coverage inland.
Additional RF contact tracking east -- consistent signature with the earlier confirmed swarm, spreading coverage inland.
Ottawa security camera: delta-wing silhouettes at ~150 m altitude. 8–12 units heading southwest toward Toronto.
CFB Valcartier perimeter camera: impact on vehicle depot. Fire visible across multiple buildings.
Whitehorse YT ham radio net check-in: distant explosions and aircraft noise reported. Operator confirms this matches reports from other provinces on the network.
Additional RF contact tracking west -- consistent signature with the earlier confirmed swarm, spreading coverage inland.
Additional RF contact tracking east -- consistent signature with the earlier confirmed swarm, spreading coverage inland.
Ottawa traffic camera: Shahed formation overflying Rideau Canal at ~180 km/h heading 225° toward Toronto.
Additional RF contact tracking east -- consistent signature with the earlier confirmed swarm, spreading coverage inland.
Yellowknife NT ham radio net check-in: distant explosions and aircraft noise reported. Operator confirms this matches reports from other provinces on the network.
Explosion CFB Bagotville — flight line struck. One of only two NORAD fighter-intercept bases in eastern Canada now offline.
RF contact near Beaver Creek YT: drone propulsion signature detected crossing from the Alaska side, low altitude, heading toward Whitehorse.
Charlottetown PE ham radio net check-in: distant explosions and aircraft noise reported. Operator confirms this matches reports from other provinces on the network.
Explosion CFB Halifax — dockyard struck. Fires visible from across the harbour.
RF contact near Beaver Creek YT: drone propulsion signature detected crossing from the Alaska side, low altitude, heading toward Whitehorse.
RF contact near Beaver Creek YT: drone propulsion signature detected crossing from the Alaska side, low altitude, heading toward Whitehorse.
RF contact near Beaver Creek YT: drone propulsion signature detected crossing from the Alaska side, low altitude, heading toward Whitehorse.
Coast Guard visual contact, open Pacific west of Haida Gwaii: drone breaking from a fishing-vessel-disguised launch platform, heading toward Prince Rupert.
Coast Guard visual contact, open Pacific west of Haida Gwaii: drone breaking from a fishing-vessel-disguised launch platform, heading toward Prince Rupert.
Explosion CFB Esquimalt — Pacific Fleet home dockyard struck.
RF contact near Beaver Creek YT: drone propulsion signature detected crossing from the Alaska side, low altitude, heading toward Whitehorse.
Coast Guard visual contact, open Pacific west of Haida Gwaii: drone breaking from a fishing-vessel-disguised launch platform, heading toward Prince Rupert.
Halifax Stanfield Airport camera: runway impact. Terminal evacuated, all flights grounded.
Coast Guard visual contact, open Pacific west of Haida Gwaii: drone breaking from a fishing-vessel-disguised launch platform, heading toward Prince Rupert.
RF contact near Beaver Creek YT: drone propulsion signature detected crossing from the Alaska side, low altitude, heading toward Whitehorse.
RF contact near Beaver Creek YT: drone propulsion signature detected crossing from the Alaska side, low altitude, heading toward Whitehorse.
RF contact near Beaver Creek YT: drone propulsion signature detected crossing from the Alaska side, low altitude, heading toward Whitehorse.

CFB Comox perimeter camera: impact on flight line. Search-and-rescue squadron hangar burning.
